title: Programming Learning Checks
description: A few short tests for checking software understanding.

tests.title: JavaScript Functions
tests.instructions: Answer without looking anything up. Use examples when useful.

questions.prompt: What is a closure, and why is it useful?
How does `this` behave differently in arrow functions?
Which syntax creates an arrow function?
options: function add(a, b) { return a + b; }
def add(a, b): return a + b

tests.title: HTTP Basics
tests.instructions: Focus on practical meaning, not memorized wording.

questions.prompt: What is the difference between GET and POST?
Which status code usually means the resource was not found?
Describe what happens from clicking a link to receiving an HTTP response.
